title: Washer catalog — top-load full auto · all colors · black filter in UI

filtersApplied.automation: fully automatic only (half-auto / twin-tub / manual excluded)
filtersApplied.color: all colors included; use UI Black only filter

marketNote: Deep B.TECH scrape of top-load category (~138 listed sitewide). Catalog has 87 full-auto 7–15 kg models after filters. Default gallery view shows ALL — use Main 7–9 kg or Black only as needed.

householdContext.note: 7–9 kg enough for two; 9 kg buffer for bedding

disclaimer: Prices from B.TECH 2026-07-17 deep scrape. Re-verify before buy.

items.name: Sharp ES-TN09GDSP Top Load washing Machine , 9 kg , Black
pros: Couple-size 9 kg — weekly loads for two without oversized bulk
Black finish matches aesthetics preference
Sharp service network is familiar in Egypt via major chains
Affordable ~13,549 EGP — leaves budget for fridge/kitchen
Sharp top-loads often include drain pump + digital controls (confirm SKU page)
cons: Non-inverter motor — louder on spin vs inverter models
items.summary: Sharp 9kg black top-load standard, ~13,549 EGP — main band, fit 8.6/10.
